emotional_patterns.example_text: I am extremely angry with the service I received from Policybazaar.
I am shocked and appalled by the way Policybazaar handled my claim.
I don't understand why Policybazaar is making it so difficult for me to cancel my policy.
Oh great, just what I needed, another annoying call from Policybazaar.

real_complaints_cleaned: Policybazaar's customer support is unhelpful and unresponsive.
Policybazaar's claims process is slow and inefficient.
Policybazaar's sales team is aggressive and pushy.
Policybazaar's service team is deadwood and unresponsive.
Policybazaar's website is difficult to navigate and understand.
domain_issues: Policybazaar's customer support is not available 24/7.
Policybazaar's claims process is not transparent.
Policybazaar's sales team is not honest about policy details.
Policybazaar's service team is not responsive to customer needs.
